news.title: 美国知名地产兄弟因性交易案被判有罪
news.title0: High-profile US real estate brothers convicted in sex trafficking case
news.content: 美国两名知名房地产经纪人兄弟被陪审团裁定犯有性交易等多项罪名，数十年来他们涉嫌下药并强奸多名女性。
news.content0: Two famous brothers who worked as real estate brokers have been convicted of drugging and raping dozens of women over the course of decades.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 好莱坞金童查拉梅因言论遭抵制
news.title0: Has Hollywood golden boy Timothée Chalamet lost his shine?
news.content: 奥斯卡热门影星蒂莫西·查拉梅因称“没人关心”芭蕾和歌剧引发强烈反弹，其公众形象及获奖前景受质疑。
news.content0: Timothée Chalamet was, until very recently, Hollywood's golden boy and a frontrunner to win an Oscar this weekend - so is the recent backlash about more than his views on ballet and opera?
news.author: BBC

news.title: 五名伊朗女足球员获澳大利亚人道主义签证
news.title0: Five Iranian footballers granted Australian visas after anthem protest
news.content: 因赛前拒唱国歌引发安全担忧，五名伊朗女足队员在亚洲杯出局后获澳大利亚人道主义签证，得以留在该国。
news.content0: Five members of the Iranian women's football team have been granted humanitarian visas in Australia after their elimination in the Asian Cup, the government in Canberra says.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 特朗普对伊朗战争结束时间发出混乱信号
news.title0: Mixed messages from Trump leave more questions than answers over war's end
news.content: 美国总统特朗普就美以对伊朗军事行动的结束时间发出矛盾信息，引发市场剧烈波动及对其战争目标的质疑。
news.content0: President Donald Trump and his administration have so far offered mixed messages and contradictory explanations on the joint US-Israeli military campaign against Iran. And Monday - the 10th day of an operation that has rattled allies and shaken markets - typified this confusion around the war's timeline and ultimate goals.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英国议员否决16岁以下社交媒体禁令
news.title0: MPs reject call for under-16s social media ban, backing more flexible powers
news.content: 英国下议院否决效仿澳大利亚禁止16岁以下青少年使用社交媒体的提案，转而支持赋予部长更灵活的监管权力。
news.content0: MPs have rejected an Australia-style ban on social media for under-16s, and have instead backed flexible ministerial powers.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 加拿大总理卡尼宣布补选以争取多数席位
news.title0: Carney calls three by-elections in Canada that could grant him a majority
news.content: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼宣布举行三场补选，若自由党全胜将获得议会多数席位，从而更易通过法案。
news.content0: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has announced three by-elections on 13 April - races that could give his party a majority in the government.
news.author: BBC

news.title: AI公司Anthropic起诉五角大楼供应链风险标签
news.title0: Anthropic sues the Trump administration after it was designated a supply chain risk
news.content: 人工智能公司Anthropic起诉美国国防部等机构，反对特朗普政府将其列为“供应链风险”，此举影响其与国防承包商业务。
news.content0: Anthropic is suing the Department of Defense and other federal agencies on Monday over the Trump administration’s decision to label the AI company a “supply chain risk.”
news.author: CNN

news.title: 古巴以恐怖主义罪起诉六名流亡者
news.title0: Cuba charges six exiles with terrorism over Florida-registered speedboat attack
news.content: 古巴检方以恐怖主义罪起诉六名流亡者，指控他们驾驶快艇进入古巴水域并袭击边防部队，造成四死六伤。
news.content0: Cuban prosecutors formally charged six people with “crimes of terrorism” and ordered them held in pretrial detention on Tuesday in connection with anincident last weekin which Cuban forces killed four Cuban nationals and wounded six others aboard a speedboat that entered Cuban waters.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 英国指控男子谋杀儿童杀手亨特利
news.title0: Man charged with murder after death of child killer Ian Huntley
news.content: 英国警方指控一名男子谋杀，此前臭名昭著的儿童杀手伊恩·亨特利在监狱内遇袭身亡。
news.content0: A man has been charged with murder after the death of Ian Huntley.
news.author: Sky News
